title: ocimum ericoides
intro: Ocimum ericoides, also known as Holly Basil or Indian Hyssop, is a perennial herb belonging to the Lamiaceae family, native to the Himalayan region. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Ocimum ericoides include its ability to reduce fever, alleviate respiratory issues, and provide relief from digestive problems. The plant can be prepared as a tea or infused oil, which are commonly used in herbal remedies and traditional Ayurvedic medicine.
